2604.27955.title: GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning: Toward Digital Inhabitants
2604.27955.paper_summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for intelligent systems that perceive and interact with graphical interfaces visually. Yet supervised fine-tuning alone cannot handle long-horizon credit assignment, distribution shifts, and safe exploration in irreversible environments, making Reinforcement Learning (RL) a central methodology for advancing automation. In this work, we present the first comprehensive overview of the intersection between RL and GUI agents, and examine how this research direction may evolve toward digital inhabitants. We propose a principled taxonomy that organizes existing methods into Offline RL, Online RL, and Hybrid Strategies, and complement it with analyses of reward engineering, data efficiency, and key technical innovations. Our analysis reveals several emerging trends: the tension between reliability and scalability is motivating the adoption of composite, multi-tier reward architectures; GUI I/O latency bottlenecks are accelerating the shift toward world-model-based training, which can yield substantial performance gains; and the spontaneous emergence of System-2-style deliberation suggests that explicit reasoning supervision may not be necessary when sufficiently rich reward signals are available. We distill these findings into a roadmap covering process rewards, continual RL, cognitive architectures, and safe deployment, aiming to guide the next generation of robust GUI automation and its agent-native infrastructure.
2604.27955.paper_summary_zh: 圖形使用者介面（GUI）代理已成為一種有前景的智能系統範式，能夠視覺上感知和與圖形介面互動。<lb/>然而，僅靠監督式微調無法處理長期信用分配、分佈變化和在不可逆環境中的安全探索，這使得強化學習（RL）成為推進自動化的核心方法論。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們呈現了RL與GUI代理之間交集的首次全面概述，並檢視這一研究方向如何可能演變為數位居民。<lb/>我們提出了一個原則性分類法，將現有方法組織為離線RL、在線RL和混合策略，並輔以對獎勵工程、數據效率和關鍵技術創新的分析。<lb/>我們的分析揭示了幾個新興趨勢：可靠性與可擴展性之間的緊張關係促使採用複合的多層獎勵架構；GUI I/O延遲瓶頸加速了向基於世界模型的訓練的轉變，這可以帶來可觀的性能提升；而系統-2風格的深思熟慮的自發出現則表明，在有足夠豐富的獎勵信號可用時，顯性推理監督可能不是必需的。<lb/>我們將這些發現提煉成一個涵蓋過程獎勵、持續RL、認知架構和安全部署的路線圖，旨在指導下一代穩健的GUI自動化及其代理原生基礎設施。
2604.27955.author: Junan Hu et.al.
2604.27955.authors: Junan Hu, Jian Liu, Jingxiang Lai, Jiarui Hu, Yiwei Sheng, Shuang Chen, Jian Li, Dazhao Du, Song Guo
